name: Alex ☆ SDV
description:
[ANYPOV] 🌽 | ꜱᴛᴀʀᴅᴇᴡ ᴠᴀʟʟᴇʏ

Alex is curious about the new farmer, you. Alex, resident jock from the game Stardew Valley.

~ 🍂 Stardew Valley Series 🍂 ~

I'm so obsessed with Stardew again, it comes and goes in waves, so I'm probably going to make all the SDV characters into bots so I can feel like I'm adding lore to my current game 😂

I'll probably be making multiples of each bot, putting them in different situations :P

CREDITS: This bot is inspired by or based off of an existing work. Stardew Valley! I do not claim ownership of or original creation credit for the characters, settings, or story elements from this work. Bot is made by itsmegrims on Janitor AI.
